creator: devosalain@ymail.com
text:
Crystal build fails with,
```
[00:20:07] gmake[1]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/crystal/work/crystal-1.4.1'

[00:20:08] (cd /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/crystal/work/crystal-1.4.1/src && /bin/sh -c '(/usr/bin/find -Ed $1 $3 | /usr/bin/cpio -dumpl $2 >/dev/null 2>&1) &&  /usr/bin/find -Ed $1 $3 \(   -type d -exec /bin/sh -c '\''cd '\''$2'\'' && chmod 755 "$@"'\'' . {} +  -o -type f -exec /bin/sh -c '\''cd '\''$2'\'' && chmod 0644 "$@"'\'' . {} + \)' COPYTREE_SHARE . /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/crystal/work/stage/usr/local/lib/crystal)
``` 

make.conf:
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+= ssl=openssl
